_description: Pre-existing defects to seed the vector store BEFORE running the agent. The duplicate/regression logic in check_duplicate matches incoming defects against these. 'status' drives the duplicate-vs-regression decision: RESOLVED/CLOSED/DONE => regression, anything else => open duplicate.

defects.title: Checkout page throws 500 when applying promo code
defects.description: When a user enters a valid promo code at checkout and clicks Apply, the page returns HTTP 500 and the cart is cleared. Reproducible on production for all payment methods.

defects.title: Login fails intermittently with token refresh race condition
defects.description: Users are randomly logged out and see 'Invalid session' when two requests refresh the auth token at the same time. Race condition in the token refresh handler.

defects.title: Dashboard charts load slowly on large accounts
defects.description: Accounts with more than 10k records take 8-12 seconds to render the analytics dashboard charts. Backend query is not paginated.

defects.title: Export to CSV includes deleted rows
defects.description: The CSV export endpoint returns soft-deleted records. Filter on is_deleted is missing in the export query.

defects.title: Mobile nav menu overlaps header on small screens
defects.description: On viewports under 360px the hamburger menu overlaps the logo in the header. Cosmetic only.
